{{nihongo|'''Nomano Shrine'''|野間神社 (能勢町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nomano Shrine'''|野間神社 (能勢町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nomano Shrine'''|野間神社 (能勢町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nomano Shrine'''|野間神社 (能勢町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].
